title: Artefacts CIT
description: CIT Resourcespack 2D and 3D models without Optifine for Tetrago RP server.
body:
This pack contains custom 2D and 3D models used by the Tetrago RP server.

This resourcespack works without Optifine.

<details>
<summary>Models</summary>
  
- Khepesh Royal

![Khepesh Royal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0dUe3QU/images/b843258294f82d01003409b3c9cf52a6cfeb0817.png)

- Arpegene Crown

![Arpegene Crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0dUe3QU/images/990b2f3f0b2be5a050c6c1790d1f5d1df51aeb21.png)

- Mitre Papale

![Mitre Papale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0dUe3QU/images/4e32ddc70d7ad7762dbbbf31c516bc00f0691a19.png)
</details>

------------------
Version "Plus" of this datapack contains models coming from other CIT resourcespacks.
These included packs have been modified to work without Optifine.

- [Dee's Extended Equipment | CIT Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/dees-extended-equipment)
- [maeflowers' CIT Pack](https://maeflowersmc.wixsite.com/minecraft/catalog)

------------------
<details>
<summary>On 5.1 version only</summary>

_Models using stonecutter via Artefacts datapack companion._

_Link to [Artefacts CIT datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/artefacts-dp)_
</details>
